channel.title: GlobalAzure on Code it Yourself...
channel.description: Recent content in GlobalAzure on Code it Yourself...

item.title: Running the Global Azure Bootcamp Science Lab in Kubernetes
item.description:
Next Saturday the Global Azure Bootcamp will be celebrated all over the world and as in previous years their will be a Science Lab where we’ll try to discover a planet!!!. Isn’t that cool?

Well to make this fast you can run the Science Lab using Azure Container Instances following the instructions found here or you can use the following gist to run the workload in an existing kubernetes cluster:

Hope it helps!

item.title: Cloud Design Patterns: Prepara tu aplicación para Azure
item.description:
En esta sesión: Cloud Design Patterns: Prepara tu aplicación para Azure discutiremos los beneficios de aplicar patrones en el desarrollo de aplicaciones para la nube y los problemas que estos intentan resolver: disponibilidad, escalabilidad, resiliencia, seguridad, etc..

Esta es la agenda:

  • Design for the Cloud
  • Problem Areas in the Cloud

    • Availability

    • Data Management

    • Design and Implementation

      Messaging

    • Management and Monitoring

      Performance and Scalability

    • Resiliency

      Security

  • Cloud Design Patterns

    • Cache-aside

      Circuit Breaker

    • Competing Consumers

      CQRS

    • Event Sourcing

    • Valet Key

    • Health Endpoint Monitoring

    • Static Content Hosting

El código de la sesión lo podéis descargar en: https://github.com/cmendible/CloudDesignPatterns
